prompt: A high-angle, anime-style illustration of a girl with long dark hair with purple tips standing inside a futuristic glass elevator, looking up at a massive space elevator structure. She is wearing a sailor uniform with a pleated skirt and thigh-high socks. The elevator cab has metallic railings, glowing cyan accents, and a digital display showing an upward arrow and the text "005829 km". Through the large glass ceiling and windows, a colossal, intricately detailed space station with a central pillar and a large ring structure is visible against a backdrop of a starry sky and the curvature of Earth with clouds below. The lighting is dramatic, emphasizing the vast scale of the space structure and the atmospheric perspective.
